channel.title: +Land on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Land on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Infantry
item.description: Pre-gun Keeping the line/ formation was very important - like kabbaDDi. Two blocks push against each other with shields, and front row would poke each other with swords or lances. Armored Personnel Carrier BTR-80 8×8 wheeled amphibious Command vehicle analyze and transmit data, and control forces
